summary: Comprehensive testing of Smart Inventory & Supply Chain Management System completed successfully. All backend APIs (27/27) and frontend features working perfectly. Cross-role data flow integration verified.
passed_tests: All 27 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Role switcher functionality across all 3 roles
Farmer Dashboard: metrics, produce listing, harvest tracking, notifications
Warehouse Dashboard: metrics, IoT monitoring, stock management pipeline
Retailer Dashboard: metrics, order management, inventory view, sales tracking
Cross-role data flow: Farmer adds produce → Retailer orders → Warehouse processes → Farmer notifications
Charts and visualizations (Bar charts, Pie charts)
